html:
Exclusive to:

The Moon Glass is a naturally-spawning object exclusive to Don't Starve Together, introduced in Return of Them. It is found on the Lunar Island mostly in the Lunar Mine, Lunar Baths and above Vitreoasis in Lunar Grotto Biomes. It can be mined for two Moon Shards and 25% to get 1 extra.

Vitreoasis full moon regeneration makes this resource renewable.

Trivia

  • Moon Glass was introduced in the Turn of Tides update.
  • Judging by many quotes, these glasses are formed due to water saturated with lunar dirt. In the Scrapbook for Small Vitreoasis it is already specified that this happens only in certain light.

Gallery

  • All Moon Glass mining stages.
DSTDSRoGSWHam

"moonglass_rock"
“I can practically see my reflection in it.”
–Wilson
“That's a big chunk of glass!”
–Willow
“Sharp stuff that fell from sky cheese.”
–Wolfgang
“What a sickly color.”
–Wendy
“THIS ROCK IS SUPERIOR TO ALL OTHER ROCKS”
–WX-78
“It appears to be mineral, but may actually be organic in nature.”
–Wickerbottom
“That's a big hunk of moon stuff.”
–Woodie
“"Moon" detritus.”
–Maxwell
“Mani sent it döwn himself.”
–Wigfrid
“Is the moon green, too?”
–Webber
“That's quite a bit of glass.”
–Warly
“Clear Rock”
–Wormwood
“Wonder if it's got any special properties.”
–Winona
“A handsome devil is reflected back at me! Hyuyu!”
–Wortox
“Good color, florp.”
–Wurt
“I've never seen a rock like this before.”
–Walter
“Jagged glass coming from the ground, what could go wrong?”
–Wanda
The Moon Glass is a naturally-spawning object exclusive to Don't Starve Together, introduced in Return of Them. It is found on the Lunar Island mostly in the Lunar Mine, Lunar Baths and above Vitreoasis in Lunar Grotto Biomes. It can be mined for two Moon Shards and 25% to get 1 extra.
Vitreoasis full moon regeneration makes this resource renewable.
Trivia[edit | edit source]
Moon Glass was introduced in the Turn of Tides update.
Judging by many quotes, these glasses are formed due to water saturated with lunar dirt. In the Scrapbook for Small Vitreoasis it is already specified that this happens only in certain light.
